creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:

il.com> wrote:
>
> 2010/10/3 J.R. Oldroyd <fbsd@opal.com>:

te:
> >>
> >> Maintainer of sysutils/xfce4-cpugraph-plugin,
> >>
> >> Please note that PR ports/151174 has just been submitted.
> >>
> >> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> >> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> >> and a committer will take care of it.
> >>
> >> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> >> =C2=A0 =C2=A0 http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/151174
> >>
> >
> > Hi Oliver,
> >
> > Thanks for your port update.
> >
> > Would you like to take over maintainership of this port, please?
> > I am low on time for this at the moment. =C2=A0If so, could you re-subm=
it
> > the patch also changing the MAINTAINER line to yourself.
> >
>=20
> Yes for sure.
>=20
> > Thanks,
> > =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0-jr
> >
>=20
>=20
>=20

This patch has been resubmitted as ports/151175.  Please
close this PR.

	-jr
